mapper.insert:
SELECT BEEZ.generate_pk_auto('project') FROM dual
INSERT INTO project ( id, identifier, title, description, is_public, parent_id, created_on, start_date, end_date, status, is_lock, default_version_id, user_id ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{identifier}, #{title}, #{description}, #{isPublic}, #{parentId}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, #{endDate}, 'K1', 'L0', #{defaultVersionId}, #{userId} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, user_id, end_date FROM project ORDER BY id
